note: Real live-claude shape (v2.1.214): a parent launches two background subagents via the `Agent` tool; each subagent's inner Bash streams with a TOP-LEVEL parent_tool_use_id, then raises a `can_use_tool` gate whose envelope has NO parent_tool_use_id but carries request.tool_use_id (= the inner Bash id) and request.agent_id. The flat parser must survive this and surface both gates.
